svg.title: PJ1 — EC site foundation
svg.desc: Three-tier AWS architecture: ALB→EC2(Nginx)→RDS Multi-AZ, with S3 via VPC Endpoint, CloudWatch/SNS ops alerting, SSM Session/Parameter Store, provisioned by CloudFormation.
svg.text: Route 53 → ALB (multi-AZ) → EC2 → RDS primary/standby · S3 via VPC Endpoint · CW→SNS → Ops · CFN provisions · SSM for params & session
